description:
You are the Offshore Navigator and Watch Captain for a racing yacht competing in the Newport Bermuda Race (635 nautical miles, Newport RI to Bermuda). Build a complete passage plan in Garmin BaseCamp consisting of the following waypoints and routes. Export the final collection as a GPX file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Newport_Bermuda_2024_PassagePlan.gpx.

Waypoints (Coordinates in decimal degrees; positive=N, negative=W):
- Name: BRENTON REEF WHISTLE | Lat: 41.4901 Lon: -71.3128 | Symbol: Buoy, White | Comment: Race start area. Brenton Reef Lighted Whistle Buoy R2. Log departure time and course.
- Name: NANTUCKET LS FLOAT | Lat: 41.2539 Lon: -69.9921 | Symbol: Buoy, White | Comment: Clear Nantucket Lightship Float to N. Shoal water to S and E. Depth < 20m nearby.
- Name: GEORGES BANK SE | Lat: 40.5000 Lon: -67.0000 | Symbol: Waypoint | Comment: SE corner Georges Bank. Heavy fishing fleet area. Maintain AIS watch. ETA Day 1+.
- Name: GULF STREAM ENTRY | Lat: 38.8000 Lon: -66.5000 | Symbol: Danger | Comment: Gulf Stream entry. Update weather routing. Log time, COG, SOG, set, drift. Expect 2-4kt favorable.
- Name: GULF STREAM EXIT | Lat: 36.5000 Lon: -65.8000 | Symbol: Danger | Comment: Gulf Stream exit. Cross stream perpendicular. Call weather router on Iridium before crossing.
- Name: BERMUDA APPROACH N | Lat: 33.2000 Lon: -64.9000 | Symbol: Waypoint | Comment: N Bermuda approach. Reduce sail. Check NE Channel tides. Call Bermuda Radio Ch16.
- Name: NORTH ROCK BUOY | Lat: 32.4985 Lon: -64.8024 | Symbol: Buoy, White | Comment: North Rock Whistle Buoy. ID on chart. NE Channel entry. Slow to 6kts max.
- Name: ST. DAVIDS HEAD FINISH | Lat: 32.3682 Lon: -64.6515 | Symbol: Flag, Blue | Comment: Newport-Bermuda Race FINISH LINE. St. Davids Head Light. Radio finish to race committee.
- Name: EMERGENCY - HALIFAX NS | Lat: 44.6476 Lon: -63.5752 | Symbol: Medical Facility | Comment: Emergency diversion: Halifax, Nova Scotia. Customs: 1-888-502-9889. Marina VHF Ch68.
- Name: EMERGENCY - AZORES | Lat: 37.7412 Lon: -25.6756 | Symbol: Medical Facility | Comment: Emergency diversion: Ponta Delgada, Azores (Portugal). Clearance required. VHF Ch16.

Routes:
- Name: NEWPORT BERMUDA 2024 RHUMB | Waypoints in order: BRENTON REEF WHISTLE, NANTUCKET LS FLOAT, GEORGES BANK SE, GULF STREAM ENTRY, GULF STREAM EXIT, BERMUDA APPROACH N, NORTH ROCK BUOY, ST. DAVIDS HEAD FINISH
- Name: NEWPORT BERMUDA 2024 WEATHER ALT | Waypoints in order: BRENTON REEF WHISTLE, NANTUCKET LS FLOAT, EMERGENCY - HALIFAX NS, GULF STREAM ENTRY, GULF STREAM EXIT, BERMUDA APPROACH N, NORTH ROCK BUOY, ST. DAVIDS HEAD FINISH
